languages.text: [Показать дневник Себериана] "Если не верите мне, то взгляните на это. Правда написана вашей собственной рукой".

traits.locale_text: драфт [показать дневник Себериана] не верите мне, тогда поверьте тому, что написано вашей рукой?

languages.text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."
languages.original_text: [Показать дневник Себериана] "Если не верите мне, то взгляните на это. Правда написана вашей собственной рукой".

[Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

languages.text: 【出示塞贝里安的日记】“你若不信，那就看看这个。真相就在你亲笔写下的字里行间。”
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: 【出示塞贝里安的日记】“你若不信，那就看看这个。真相就在你亲笔写下的字里行间。”

languages.text: [Lui montrer le journal de Seberian] « Si vous ne me croyez pas, jetez plutôt un coup d'œil à ceci. La vérité est consignée sur ces pages de votre propre main. »
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: [Lui montrer le journal de Seberian] « Si vous ne me croyez pas, jetez plutôt un coup d'œil à ceci. La vérité est consignée sur ces pages de votre propre main. »

languages.text: [Ona Seberian'ın günlüğünü göster] "Bana inanmıyorsan şuna bak. Hakikat, bizzat kendi el yazınla kelimelere dökülmüş."
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: [Ona Seberian'ın günlüğünü göster] "Bana inanmıyorsan şuna bak. Hakikat, bizzat kendi el yazınla kelimelere dökülmüş."

languages.text: [Mostrarle el diario de Seberian] «Si no me cree, lea esto. La verdad, escrita de su puño y letra».
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: [Mostrarle el diario de Seberian] «Si no me cree, lea esto. La verdad, escrita de su puño y letra».

languages.text: [Ihm Seberians Tagebuch zeigen] "Wenn Ihr mir nicht glaubt, seht Euch das hier an. Die Wahrheit, geschrieben in Eurer eigenen Handschrift."
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: [Ihm Seberians Tagebuch zeigen] "Wenn Ihr mir nicht glaubt, seht Euch das hier an. Die Wahrheit, geschrieben in Eurer eigenen Handschrift."

languages.text: 「信じないなら、この日記を見てください。真実があなたの手書きで記されています。」
languages.original_text: [Show him Seberian's diary] "If you don't believe me, then look at this. The truth is written in your own hand."

traits.locale_text: 「信じないなら、この日記を見てください。真実があなたの手書きで記されています。」
